data.title: Marchex to report Q2 2025 financial results on August 12th, 2025 at 4:20 p.m. ET. Will post press release on its website.
data.description: Seattle-based Marchex, a company utilizing AI and conversational intelligence for operational efficiency and revenue growth, will disclose its financial outcomes for the second quarter of 2025 on August 12, 2025, around 4:20 p.m. ET. The results will be available on their corporate website's Press Center page. Marchex operates under the ticker symbol MCHX on the NASDAQ.
Swiss President Keller-Sutter Announced That The Swiss Government Continues To Keep In Contact With The United States And Has Already Made Initial Contact.
China Forex regulator vows to maintain stability in FX market.

data.title: Equitable Bank closes $300M deposit note issuance, showing confidence in funding strategy.
data.description: Equitable Bank, known as Canada's Challenger Bank™, has successfully completed a $300 million floating rate deposit note offering, signaling ongoing faith in the bank's funding approach and future growth prospects. The issuance, which closed in Toronto on August 1, 2025, indicates the bank's commitment to its long-term strategy.
Swiss President Keller-Sutter States That While Pharmaceuticals Are Not Affected, U.S. Tariffs Pose Serious Problems For Swiss Machinery Sector and Urges Watching Related Industries

data.title: HOKA launches Mafate 5 with Rocker Integrity technology for trail performance. Available for purchase on Hoka.com and at authorized dealers worldwide.
data.description: In Goleta, California, HOKA®, a division of Deckers Brands (NYSE: DECK), has launched the Mafate 5, the newest addition to its popular trail series. Designed for ultra-runners aiming to tackle challenging trails, the Mafate 5 offers improved durability, versatility, and cushioning for long-distance running on rugged terrain. The Mafate 5 can be purchased on HOKA.com and through authorized retailers globally. The latest model introduces the innovative Rocker Integrit technology, providing runners with enhanced performance features.

data.title: Zscaler acquires Red Canary to enhance AI-driven security operations, advancing SOC capabilities with threat intelligence and automation.
data.description: By integrating Red Canary's threat intelligence and automation tools with Zscaler's extensive data and unified SecOps platform, the collaboration aims to create highly advanced Security Operations Center (SOC) capabilities. This partnership will leverage Red Canary's expertise in threat detection and response, along with Zscaler's robust data resources, to enhance security measures and streamline incident response procedures. The union of these technologies will offer unparalleled SOC capabilities by providing a comprehensive view of cybersecurity threats and enabling proactive defense strategies. This collaboration presents a significant advancement in SOC capabilities for the industry by combining essential threat intelligence and automation with a powerful SecOps platform.

data.title: EPSO-G will refinance Amber Grid's short-term loan, company code 302826889, based in Vilnius, Lithuania.
data.description: A new energy entity called EPSO-G, also known as the Group, with the company code 302826889 and headquarters situated at Laisvės pr. 10 in Vilnius, Lithuania, has been established.

data.title: Ryder names Kyle Walton of Bristol, PA as 2025 Top Technician at Annual Championship, awarded $50,000 grand prize.
data.description: In Miami, Ryder System, Inc. (NYSE: R) is standing out as an attractive employer in the transportation and logistics sector due to the increasing need for skilled professionals. The company is focusing on investing in the growth, acknowledgment, and progression of adept technicians essential for the smooth movement of freight. In recognition of their dedication to cultivating top talent, Ryder honored Kyle Walton from Bristol, PA as the 2025 Top Technician, presenting him with a grand prize of $50,000.
US CEA's Miran: Tariff uncertainty is fading away - CNN Interview

data.title: Live Love Spa celebrates National Wellness Month with flagship event in LA, promoting self-care. Aug. 1, 2025. #WellnessMonth
data.description: An initiative spanning across the country is encouraging people to focus on self-care, featuring a main event in Los Angeles that showcases the newest wellness developments. The flagship event in Los Angeles is on August 1, 2025, marking the return of National Wellness Month, with a focus on promoting well-being through various activities and innovations.

data.title: Ambassador Suzan Johnson Cook backs Freedom Plaza in op-ed, emphasizing equity and values for Manhattan's East Side vision.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, Rev. Dr. Ambassador Suzan Johnson Cook made a significant statement of endorsement for Freedom Plaza, a groundbreaking civic and cultural initiative on Manhattan's East Side launched by Soloviev Group and Mohegan. The op-ed emphasizes Rev. Dr. Ambassador Johnson Cook's public backing for this transformative project, highlighting its potential to redefine the area.

data.title: Gary Levenbach is appointed as President and Chief Actuary of Independence American Insurance Company by IPH.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, Independence Pet Holdings, Inc. (IPH) revealed that Gary Levenbach has been named as the President and Chief Actuary of its branch, Independence American Insurance Company (IAIC). Levenbach brings over 20 years of experience in actuarial and finance fields to this role.

data.title: Insta360 adds Strava compatibility to Stats Dashboard for active outdoor athletes; view real-time data seamlessly in videos.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, Insta360 introduced Strava compatibility for its Stats Dashboard feature. This allows cyclists and outdoor athletes to incorporate real-time performance data within their videos. The feature provides a new visualization tool for tracking and analyzing performance metrics.

data.title: SiMa.ai secures $85M funding, total now $355M. Oversubscribed round led by Maverick Capital, StepStone Group joins.
data.description: In an oversubscribed round of funding led by Maverick Capital, SiMa.ai, a company based in San Jose, California, specializing in purpose-built hardware and software solutions for Physical AI, has secured $85 million. Additionally, StepStone Group has come on board as a new investor. The funding round indicates strong interest and support for SiMa.ai's innovative approach to AI technology.

data.title: Ian T. Clark appointed to BioMarin's Board of Directors, previously CEO of Genentech.
data.description: In San Rafael, California, on August 1, 2025, BioMarin Pharmaceutical Inc. (Nasdaq: BMRN) revealed the appointment of Ian T. Clark to their Board of Directors, starting immediately on the same day. Clark, former Chief Executive Officer of Genentech, joins the board bringing his expertise along with him.

data.title: Popilush opens 3,000 sq. ft. store in Las Vegas, marking its expansion into physical retail from online.
data.description: Renowned shapewear brand, Popilush, known for its viral fashion pieces, has ventured into physical retail by launching its inaugural flagship store in New York City. The 3,000 square foot space marks a significant achievement for the award-winning brand.

data.title: NeuroSense, a biotech company, reports progress in H1 2025. Specializes in treatments for neurodegenerative diseases.
data.description: NeuroSense Therapeutics Ltd., a leading clinical biotechnology company based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, shared a corporate update on July 31, 2025. The company, listed on the NASDAQ as NRSN, focuses on developing innovative therapies for severe neurodegenerative disorders. They highlighted recent achievements and progress in their late-stage clinical trials.
Ownership interest in company disclosed, holds significant number of shares.

data.title: EPSO-G plans to refinance a significant amount of short-term financial debt for Amber Grid.
data.description: In a recent report, it has been disclosed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, marking a significant decrease compared to the previous quarter. The number of new jobs created in the last month alone reached a record-breaking 300,000, with the majority of positions being in the service industry. Additionally, the average hourly wage has increased by 2.5% over the last year, indicating positive growth in the economy. Experts predict that these trends are likely to continue in the coming months, leading to further improvements in the labor market.
